scripts.release:prepare: npm run hosted:prepare && npm run lint && npm run webos:package && npm run release:artifacts
scripts.sync:upstream:all: npm run sync:upstream:release && npm run sync:upstream:android-context
scripts.webos:package: npm run hosted:prepare && npm run webos:prepare-app && ares-package webos/app webos/service -o build/
scripts.test:webos: node --no-deprecation tools/webos/hlsPlaylistClient.test.mjs && node --no-deprecation tools/webos/playerKeyBindings.test.mjs && node --no-deprecation tools/webos/localVod.test.mjs
